rationale.R1.6: Delegation 'clean this up' applied to a technical writing artifact is unambiguously a sentence- and paragraph-level repair task. The artifact exhibits chronic run-on construction (long chains of 'and'-joined clauses), unstable tense (present, simple past, and progressive-past 'had been' mixed within and across paragraphs), and redundant hedging phrases. Resolving these is the entire scope of the request and failure to do so invalidates the delegation.
